message.msgTxt: '{"term":"Spring 2025","total":10,"summary":{"needsAction":5,"approved":4,"waitlisted":2},"requests":[{"id":"ENR-001","studentId":"STU-005","studentName":"Sofia Garcia","courseId":"PSY-480","courseName":"Counseling Practicum","type":"Waitlist","status":"Waitlisted","waitlistPosition":1,"submitted":"2025-01-10","notes":"Needs for graduation requirements."},{"id":"ENR-002","studentId":"STU-004","studentName":"Tyler Brooks","courseId":"ENG-350","courseName":"Geotechnical Engineering","type":"Add","status":"Blocked","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-12","notes":"Blocked by Financial Hold. Contact Student Accounts."},{"id":"ENR-003","studentId":"STU-008","studentName":"Devon Mitchell","courseId":"HIST-105","courseName":"World History I","type":"Add","status":"Blocked","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-11","notes":"Blocked by Academic Hold. Advisor meeting required."},{"id":"ENR-004","studentId":"STU-002","studentName":"Marcus Rivera","courseId":"BUS-480","courseName":"Business Capstone","type":"Add","status":"Pending Review","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-14","notes":"Academic probation - requires advisor approval."},{"id":"ENR-005","studentId":"STU-007","studentName":"Priya Nair","courseId":"CS-495","courseName":"Senior Capstone II","type":"Add","status":"Approved","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-09","notes":"Approved. Graduation clearance still pending separately."},{"id":"ENR-006","studentId":"STU-001","studentName":"Emily Chen","courseId":"CS-401","courseName":"Advanced Algorithms","type":"Drop","status":"Approved","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-20","notes":"Student requested drop within add/drop window."},{"id":"ENR-007","studentId":"STU-009","studentName":"Rachel Torres","courseId":"NURS-350","courseName":"Clinical Rotation II","type":"Waitlist","status":"Waitlisted","waitlistPosition":2,"submitted":"2025-01-08","notes":"Waitlisted pending seat availability."},{"id":"ENR-008","studentId":"STU-003","studentName":"Aisha Johnson","courseId":"BIOL-315","courseName":"Genetics","type":"Add","status":"Approved","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-13","notes":"Prerequisites verified. Enrolled."},{"id":"ENR-009","studentId":"STU-011","studentName":"Megan Walsh","courseId":"EDUC-495","courseName":"Student Teaching","type":"Add","status":"Blocked","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-15","notes":"Blocked by Background Check hold."},{"id":"ENR-010","studentId":"STU-006","studentName":"James Kim","courseId":"CS-301","courseName":"Data Structures","type":"Add","status":"Approved","waitlistPosition":null,"submitted":"2025-01-10","notes":"Approved as cross-listed elective."}]}'
